name: Self-Frosting Anise Drops
recipeIngredient: 3 teaspoons Anise seed (or 1 teaspoon anise extract or 1/4 teaspoon anise oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease and generously flour the cookie sheets.
3. Beat eggs with an electric mixer until fluffy.
4. Add sugar gradually, beating constantly; continue to beat for 20 more minutes.
5. Reduce speed of mixer and add flour that has been sifted with baking powder and salt; beat for 3 minutes.
6. Add anise.
7. Drop by teaspoonsful on prepared cookie sheets, swirling dough to form round cookies.
8. Let stand uncovered at room temperature for at least 8 hours.
9. Bake for 10 minutes or until cookies are a creamy golden color on the bottom (do not allow bottoms to brown). Cookies form a cake-like layer on the bottom with a crisp "frosting" on the top.
10. Store in a tightly covered container.
